narrative:
Wayne County has 68,602 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.6% of registrants.
